parsed.generic_mechanism: One block preserves an ordered premise-to-conclusion sequence; the other rearranges shared material so instructions, claims, and explanations arrive without their required setup.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A scrambles instructions, anecdotes, medical claims, and conclusions so premises often follow their summaries; it still rejects blame and resistance, but its causal chain is unusable, medically categorical, and supported by unbounded success and clinic claims.
paraphrased_evidence.B: B coherently sequences belief revision toward desire-free change and locates the problem in conditioning rather than character, but it uses severe health alarm, categorical disease and addiction claims, and unspecified clinic reach and success as material warrant.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: A scrambles instructions, anecdotes, medical claims, and conclusions so premises often follow their summaries; it still rejects blame and resistance, but its causal chain is unusable, medically categorical, and supported by unbounded success and clinic claims.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: B coherently sequences belief revision toward desire-free change and locates the problem in conditioning rather than character, but it uses severe health alarm, categorical disease and addiction claims, and unspecified clinic reach and success as material warrant.
